raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ap trejo Methneſcho
Laiku tappe Juhdan fluddinahts
un faẓẓihs : Tahmare tava
Weddekle irr Mauzibu dsinnusi/
in raugi/ ta irr arridsan gruhta
o Maunkofchanas/ tad faẓẓija
uhda: Weddeet to preekschā/ ka
fadedsinata tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu ta tappe preekschā
esta/ tad fuhtiia ta pee fawn
ehwozi/ un faẓẓija: No ta Wiḣ
/ kam fchahs Leetas peederr/
imu es gruhta/ un ta faẓẓija:
tiḣsti jelle/kam peederr tas ais-
eeschamajs Gredfens/ un fchis
uts/ un fchi Needra?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Juhda pasinne tahs/
faẓẓija: Ta Seeiva irr taiṣ-
ka/ ne kā es/ tapehz/ ka es
irnu mannant Dehtam See-
im ne efinu derwis/ un wiṅsch to
airs ne atsinne.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tai bij dseindecht/
ugi/ tad bija Droihni winnas
feefās.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad ta dseindeja/ tad
ahse weens to Rohku/ un ta
ehrnu Saṇehmeja nehme to/
fehje weenn farkanu Pave-
ni ap to Rohkn/ un faẓẓija:
chis nahks pirnak ahra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas to Rohku ce-
ike/ raugi/ tad nahze winna
rahlis ahra/ un ta faẓẓija: Ra-
hz efi tu fevis pehz plehsdains
ur speedees? un ta nofauze win-
Wahrdou Peerez.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz to nahze winna
Brahlis ahra/ ap ka Rohku tas
farkans Pawedens bija/ un ta
nofauze winna Wahrdou Seerus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N Jahseps tappe no-
wests us Egipti/ un
Potiwars/ Warais
Kanibar Junkurs/ un Aumei-
steris/ weens Egipteru Wihr̄
pirke to/ no to Ismaëliteru Roh-
kas/ kas to us turren bij nowed-
duschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS bija ar
Jahsepu/ ta/ ka tam wiss lainigi
isderwahs/ un tas bija fawa Kun-
ga/ ta Egiptera Nammiā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna KUNGS red-
feja/ ka tas KUNGS ar to bija/
un ka tas KUNGS/ wiffu/ ko
tas darrija/ litke zaur winnaRoh-
ku/ lainigi isdohtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atrad de Jahseps
Schehlastibu winna Breekschā/
un kalpoja winnam/ un wiṅsch
eezeble to pabr fawn Nammi/
un wiffu/ kas tam peederreja/ de-
we tas winna Rohkā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no ta Laika/ kad wiṅsch
to eezeblis bij pabr fawn Nam-
mu/ un pahr wiffu/ kas winnam
peederreja/ tad twehtiia tas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
